caption: An elderly woman with short, curly grey hair, wearing black-rimmed glasses and a red top, is seated in a black office chair. She is positioned in an office setting, with a white filing cabinet containing various documents and blue folders visible in the background. In the initial moments, she has her hand raised to her mouth, appearing thoughtful or hesitant. As the sequence progresses, she lowers her hand and begins to speak, with her expression shifting from contemplative to active communication. She wears gold hoop earrings and a thin gold necklace. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene, and there is no on-screen text or logos. The focus remains steadily on the woman from the chest up as she engages in conversation.
